testcase.name: migration is skipped when unrelated key present
falls back to FOLLOW_DEVICE when key missing
autoRewind migrates from SharedPreferences and cleans up
defaults are used when SharedPreferences empty
seekTime migrates from SharedPreferences and cleans up
migrates LIST from SharedPreferences and cleans up
intPrefsDataMigration migrates and cleans up arbitrary key
falls back to FOLLOW_DEVICE on unknown legacy value and cleans up
darkTheme migrates from SharedPreferences and cleans up
migrates GRID from SharedPreferences and cleans up
